data.name: clickLogos
data.value: Click on the Vite and React logos to learn more

data.name: pages.chat.emptyThread
data.value: No messages in this thread yet. Send the first message below.

data.name: pages.chat.waitingForAiElapsed
data.value: {{seconds}} s elapsed — local CPU model; a reply can take 1–5 min. RAM may stay flat while computing.

data.name: pages.chat.modelLoading
data.value: The AI model is still loading into memory. Chat will be available when loading finishes (first run may take several minutes).

data.name: pages.chat.modelUnavailable
data.value: The AI service is unavailable. Try again later or contact an administrator.

data.name: pages.chat.errorGeneric
data.value: Could not get an AI response. Please try again.

data.name: pages.chat.hub.errors.invalid_locale
data.value: Invalid language selection. Switch admin language to English, Slovak, or Czech and try again.

data.name: pages.chat.hub.errors.not_operator
data.value: Statistics-aware AI is only available to platform operators.

data.name: pages.chat.hub.errors.conversation_not_found
data.value: Conversation not found. Start a new chat or refresh the list.

data.name: pages.chat.hub.errors.rate_limited
data.value: Too many AI requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

data.name: pages.chat.hub.errors.model_loading
data.value: AI model is still loading. Please wait and try again.

data.name: pages.chat.hub.errors.ai_unavailable
data.value: AI service is unavailable. Please try again later.

data.name: pages.chat.hub.errors.ai_generation_failed
data.value: AI generation failed. Please try again.

data.name: pages.chat.hub.errors.ai_guard_rejected
data.value: Could not process this request (AI service or statistics context). Try again or switch statistics mode to inline.

data.name: pages.chat.timeoutError
data.value: Request timed out. The AI may still be loading. Please try again in a minute.

data.name: pages.chat.confirmDelete
data.value: Delete this conversation for all operators?

data.name: pages.chat.sidebarEmpty
data.value: No conversations yet. Start a new chat.

data.name: pages.chat.selectOrNew
data.value: Select a conversation or start a new chat.

data.name: pages.createFace.validation.descriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description must be at most 1000 characters

data.name: pages.createFace.validation.indexMaxLength
data.value: Index must be at most 100 characters

data.name: pages.createFace.validation.titleMaxLength
data.value: Title must be at most 200 characters

data.name: pages.createPage.routeTranslationsHelp
data.value: Define translated route names for each supported language.

data.name: pages.createPage.validation.descriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description must be at most 1000 characters

data.name: pages.createPage.validation.nameMaxLength
data.value: Name must be at most 200 characters

data.name: pages.createPage.validation.pathMaxLength
data.value: Path must be at most 500 characters

data.name: pages.createUser.validation.emailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: pages.createUser.validation.passwordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 12 characters

data.name: pages.dashboard.aiStats.loadError
data.value: Could not load anonymous public stats.

data.name: pages.dashboard.aiStats.offHint
data.value: Enable inline or live mode in Settings to attach anonymous platform totals to operator AI chat.

data.name: pages.dashboard.charts.barAria
data.value: Bar chart of pending, accepted, and rejected friend requests

data.name: pages.dashboard.charts.lineAria
data.value: Line chart of new user registrations and message volume per day

data.name: pages.dashboard.charts.pieAria
data.value: Donut chart of albums, blogs, reels, and stories counts

data.name: pages.dashboard.description
data.value: Admin panel overview. Manage your users, faces and content.

data.name: pages.dashboard.managePagesHint
data.value: Pages — create or edit under each face

data.name: pages.dashboard.statsError
data.value: Could not load dashboard statistics. Try again or check the API.

data.name: pages.dashboard.statsForbidden
data.value: Statistics are only available when you use the admin face URL prefix and a platform operator account. Open the admin app URL configured for the admin face (see README) and sign in as a global admin.

data.name: pages.editFace.validation.descriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description must be at most 1000 characters

data.name: pages.editFace.validation.indexMaxLength
data.value: Index must be at most 100 characters

data.name: pages.editFace.validation.titleMaxLength
data.value: Title must be at most 200 characters

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.adCarouselDesc
data.value: Paginated carousel of listings. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.adDesc
data.value: Single listing card with image, price and description.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.adGridDesc
data.value: Paginated grid of listings. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.albumCarouselDesc
data.value: Paginated carousel of albums. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.albumDesc
data.value: Main photo with 3 small thumbnails in the bottom-right corner.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.albumGridDesc
data.value: Paginated grid of albums. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.blogCarouselDesc
data.value: Paginated carousel of blog posts. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.blogDesc
data.value: Single blog post card with image, title and excerpt.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.blogGridDesc
data.value: Paginated grid of blog posts. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.chatRoomCarouselDesc
data.value: Paginated carousel of chat rooms. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.chatRoomDesc
data.value: Single chat room card with name, member count and last message.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.chatRoomGridDesc
data.value: Paginated grid of chat rooms. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.description
data.value: Select which component this grid block will display.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.reelCarouselDesc
data.value: Paginated carousel of video reels. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.reelDesc
data.value: Single vertical video reel with play overlay and engagement stats.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.reelGridDesc
data.value: Paginated grid of video reels. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.storyCarouselDesc
data.value: Paginated carousel of stories. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.storyDesc
data.value: Single story circle with user avatar and name.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.storyGridDesc
data.value: Paginated grid of stories. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.userProfileCarouselDesc
data.value: Paginated carousel of user profiles. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.userProfileDesc
data.value: Single user profile card with avatar, name and bio.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.components.userProfileGridDesc
data.value: Paginated grid of user profiles. Items count adapts to block size.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.empty
data.value: No grid blocks yet. Click 'Add Block' to start designing the layout.

data.name: pages.editPage.gridLayout.help
data.value: Design a responsive grid layout for this page. Drag to move, resize from corners. Double-click labels to rename.

data.name: pages.editPage.routeTranslationsHelp
data.value: Define translated route names for each supported language.

data.name: pages.editPage.validation.descriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description must be at most 1000 characters

data.name: pages.editPage.validation.nameMaxLength
data.value: Name must be at most 200 characters

data.name: pages.editPage.validation.pathMaxLength
data.value: Path must be at most 500 characters

data.name: pages.editUser.passwordHelp
data.value: Leave blank to keep current password

data.name: pages.editUser.passwordPlaceholder
data.value: Leave blank to keep current password

data.name: pages.editUser.validation.emailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: pages.editUser.validation.passwordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 12 characters

data.name: pages.faceWallTickets.confirmDeleteTicket
data.value: Hard-delete this ticket and all related data?

data.name: pages.homepage.description
data.value: This is a protected page. Only authenticated users can access it.

data.name: pages.login.error
data.value: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

data.name: pages.login.validation.emailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: pages.login.validation.passwordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 12 characters

data.name: pages.logout.sessionExpired
data.value: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: pages.logout.confirmMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to log out?

data.name: pages.pagesTable.confirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this page?

data.name: pages.registrationInvites.subtitle
data.value: Operator-created invites and pending self-service signups.

data.name: pages.settings.aiStats.description
data.value: Controls whether the operator AI chat receives anonymous aggregate counts (users, faces, messages, …). No private message bodies or moderation audit data are sent.

data.name: pages.settings.aiStats.hints.inline
data.value: The API injects a fresh JSON snapshot into the model context on each request.

data.name: pages.settings.aiStats.hints.live
data.value: The Python worker performs an HTTP GET of the configured public stats URL before answering (useful to validate the same path external tools would call).

data.name: pages.settings.aiStats.hints.off
data.value: AI sees only your typed conversation.

data.name: pages.settings.lead
data.value: Preferences for this browser only (stored in localStorage).

data.name: pages.userDetail.banReasonInvalid
data.value: Ban reason must be at least 10 characters

data.name: pages.userDetail.confirmGlobalBanMessage
data.value: This locks the user out of the platform and revokes active sessions.

data.name: pages.userDetail.confirmGlobalUnbanMessage
data.value: The user will be able to sign in again.

data.name: pages.userDetail.confirmFaceBanMessage
data.value: The user cannot use this face, including messenger, while banned.

data.name: pages.userDetail.platformMessageHint
data.value: Delivered as a direct message visible under every face for this user.

data.name: pages.userChat.emptyConversations
data.value: No conversations yet. Open a user from User detail to start.

data.name: pages.userChat.emptySelection
data.value: Select a conversation or open chat from a user profile.

data.name: pages.userChat.emptyThread
data.value: No messages yet. Send the first message below.

data.name: pages.userChat.targetGloballyBanned
data.value: This user is globally banned. You can still send platform messages.

data.name: pages.userChat.forbidden
data.value: User chat is available to super-admins only.

data.name: pages.userChat.hub.errors.unknown
data.value: Message could not be sent. Try again.

data.name: pages.userChat.hub.errors.not_super_admin
data.value: Only super-admins can send platform messages.

data.name: pages.userChat.hub.errors.rate_limited
data.value: Too many messages. Please wait a moment.

data.name: pages.userChat.hub.errors.no_platform_thread
data.value: No platform conversation exists with this user.
